title: nassella dasycarpa
intro: Nassella dasycarpa, also known as the Sierra Nevada needlegrass, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of California in the United States. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Nassella dasycarpa are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Nassella dasycarpa can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
